title: Luffy Takes on Mohji and Richie
description: On pages 1–4, Luffy confronts Mohji and Richie after their intimidation exposes the cruelty of Buggy’s pirates.
scene: Mohji and Richie try to use fear and force, but Luffy’s reaction turns the scene into a direct challenge against their bullying.

dialogue.speaker: Mohji
dialogue.text: wow. I THOUGHT there was something strange about you...

dialogue.speaker: Mohji
dialogue.text: ...I MEAN, YOU DID PILE- DRIVE A LION!

dialogue.speaker: Mohji
dialogue.text: What kind of human being could do that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HOW CAN YOU INFLATE YOURSELF LIKE A BALLOON!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But how do you do it!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: He's using his men as shields...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: CAP'N, THIS IS THE WORST DISGRACE WE'VE SUFFERED SINCE YOU FORMED OUR CREW...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'M SO MAD, I CAN'T EVEN SPEAK...

dialogue.speaker: Mohji
dialogue.text: CABAJ!! WHAT'RE YOU DOING TO RICHIE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WAS USING HIM AS A SHIELD. DIDN'T WANT TO SOIL MY RAIMENT.

summary: This part pushes Luffy from casual involvement into righteous anger, especially when innocent people and loyal companions are hurt.
